summary: Tested Profile Page integration for Koora Voice app. All 6 frontend tests passed (100%). Login works, Profile tab appears in Bottom Navigation, navigation to /profile works, and user information displays correctly.

frontend_features: Login with naifliver@gmail.com / As11223344 works correctly
Profile tab (حسابي) appears in Bottom Navigation
User name (Liver_97) and username (@_97) display correctly
User stats (followers, following, coins) display correctly
Edit profile button (تعديل الملف الشخصي) is present
Profile tab is highlighted (lime color) when active

feature_verified.description: ProfilePage was connected to the app via route in App.js and tab in BottomNavigation.js
feature_verified.verification: Playwright test confirmed all profile page features work correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Route /profile correctly added in App.js at line 90
Profile tab correctly added in BottomNavigation.js at line 20 with path '/profile'
ProfilePage receives user and onLogout props correctly
BottomNavigation included in ProfilePage for consistent navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page integration tested: 1) Route /profile added in App.js. 2) Profile tab (حسابي) added in BottomNavigation.js. 3) ProfilePage displays user info (name, username, avatar, stats). 4) Edit profile and logout buttons work. 5) Bottom navigation shows active state correctly.
